title: Trump pledges rapid U.S. response for Venezuela after historic earthquakes kill dozens
summary: After earthquakes killed dozens in Venezuela, Trump pledged rapid U.S. assistance, signaling a diplomatic shift toward the Venezuelan interim government. The offer reflects a significant realignment in U.S.-Venezuelan relations.
content: The swift U.S. offer of assistance reflects a degree of diplomatic realignment between the Trump administration and the Venezuelan interim government.

zh.title: 特朗普承诺在委内瑞拉历史性地震造成数十人丧生后迅速做出美国回应
zh.summary: 委内瑞拉地震造成数十人丧生后，特朗普承诺迅速提供美国援助，标志着美国对委内瑞拉临时政府外交政策的转变。这一举动反映了美委关系的重大调整。

title: Oil price falls to levels not seen since before Iran war
summary: Oil prices have fallen to pre-Iran war levels as energy markets stabilize following Iran's blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. The decline reflects improving expectations for global crude supplies after months of volatile trading.
content: Energy prices have been on a wild ride since Iran responded to US and Israeli attacks by effectively closing the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 油价跌至伊朗战争前以来未见的水平
zh.summary: 随着伊朗封锁霍尔木兹海峡后能源市场稳定，油价已跌至伊朗战争前的水平。这一下跌反映了经历数月波动交易后全球原油供应预期的改善。

title: Iran warns ships it's 'unacceptable and dangerous' to transit the Strait of Hormuz without their approval
summary: Iran has warned international shipping that transiting the Strait of Hormuz without Iranian authorization is dangerous and unacceptable. The warning underscores Tehran's determination to maintain control over this critical global oil chokepoint.
content: The stern warning underscores Tehran's resolve to retain control over the Strait of Hormuz and to resist transits that bypass its authorization.

zh.title: 伊朗警告船舶未经其批准通过霍尔木兹海峡"不可接受且危险"
zh.summary: 伊朗警告国际航运，未经伊朗授权通过霍尔木兹海峡是危险且不可接受的。这一警告强调了德黑兰维持对这一关键全球石油咽喉控制的决心。

title: Oil prices erase wartime gains as supply concerns ease with Hormuz tanker traffic resuming
summary: Oil prices declined as tankers stranded in the Persian Gulf resume transit through the Strait of Hormuz, easing global supply concerns. Investors increasingly expect crude supplies to stabilize as shipping routes reopen.
content: Oil prices fell as investors bet global crude supplies will improve, as tankers stranded in the Persian Gulf for months have begun leaving the Strait of Hormuz.

zh.title: 油价随着荷兹木兹海峡油轮运输恢复而抹去战时涨幅
zh.summary: 由于滞留在波斯湾的油轮恢复通过荷兹木兹海峡，全球供应担忧缓解，油价下跌。投资者越来越期待原油供应在航运路线重新开放时趋于稳定。

title: Fundstrat's Lee joins Wall Street bulls in calling for S&P at 8,000
summary: Tom Lee from Fundstrat Global Advisors joined other Wall Street analysts in forecasting the S&P 500 will reach 8,000 by year-end. The bullish projection reflects investor confidence in sustained market gains.
content: Fundstrat Global Advisors' Tom Lee has joined a growing chorus of Wall Street bulls forecasting the S&P 500 will end the year at 8,000.

zh.title: Fundstrat的Lee加入华尔街看涨阵营，呼吁标普500指数达到8000点
zh.summary: Fundstrat Global Advisors的Tom Lee与其他华尔街分析师一起预测标普500指数将在年底前达到8000点。这一看涨预测反映了投资者对市场持续上升的信心。

title: Ferrari marketing boss quits just weeks after EV launch backlash
summary: Ferrari's marketing chief resigned just weeks after the luxury carmaker's first electric vehicle, the Luce, faced significant design criticism. The departure suggests internal tensions over Ferrari's electric vehicle strategy.
content: The design of the luxury carmaker's first all-electric vehicle, the Luce, was heavily criticised.

zh.title: 法拉利营销主管在电动车发布遭批评数周后离职
zh.summary: 法拉利豪华车制造商的首款电动汽车Luce推出后面临重大设计批评，其营销主管在数周后辞职。这一离职表明法拉利电动汽车战略存在内部分歧。

title: Attraction tax cut welcomed by businesses
summary: The UK announced VAT cuts on children's meals and attraction tickets, a move welcomed by businesses across Surrey and the country. The tax reduction aims to support leisure and hospitality sectors.
content: VAT will be cut on children's meals and tickets to some attractions across Surrey and the UK.

zh.title: 景点门票税收削减受企业欢迎
zh.summary: 英国宣布对儿童餐食和景点门票实施增值税削减，这一举措受到萨里郡及全国各地企业的欢迎。这项税收削减旨在支持休闲和酒店行业。

title: Reeves backs Burnham to become next prime minister
summary: Chancellor Reeves publicly backed MP Andy Burnham for prime minister despite reports he might demote her if elected. The endorsement reflects shifting dynamics within Labour's leadership.
content: The chancellor throws her support behind the MP for Makerfield despite reports he could demote her if he becomes PM.

zh.title: 财政大臣里夫斯支持伯翰成为下一任首相
zh.summary: 财政大臣里夫斯公开支持议员安迪·伯翰担任首相，尽管有报道称如果伯翰当选，他可能会将她降职。这一支持反映了工党领导层内部权力动向的变化。

title: Anthropic's latest hiring spree reveals where it's building AI data centers next
summary: Anthropic is rapidly hiring for AI data center roles in Australia and Japan to expand overseas compute capacity. The expansion signals the company's strategy to build global infrastructure for large-scale AI model development.
content: The AI lab is hiring for AI data center roles in Australia and Japan as it rushes to expand compute capacity overseas.

zh.title: Anthropic最新招聘热潮透露AI数据中心建设地点
zh.summary: 为了扩展海外计算能力，Anthropic正在迅速招聘澳大利亚和日本的人工智能数据中心岗位。这一扩张反映了该公司建立全球基础设施以支持大规模AI模型开发的战略。

title: Iran's neighbor, U.S. ally: What Pakistan gains from being a peacemaker
summary: Pakistan is positioning itself as a mediator in Middle East conflicts to prevent regional instability from spilling across its borders. The diplomatic role offers Pakistan strategic influence while addressing domestic security concerns.
content: Pakistan's efforts to bring an end to the conflict in the Middle East are driven by the need to avoid a spillover across its borders.

zh.title: 伊朗的邻国、美国盟友：巴基斯坦作为和平缔造者获得什么
zh.summary: 巴基斯坦正在定位自己为中东冲突的调解人，以防止地区不稳定蔓延到其边境。这一外交角色为巴基斯坦提供战略影响力，同时解决国内安全问题。

title: Investors still seek a human touch even with AI tools at hand: HSBC
summary: An HSBC survey found investors continue relying on professional advisers for investment decisions despite having access to AI tools. The finding suggests investors value human judgment and expertise alongside technological capabilities.
content: Investors are still turning to the judgment of a professional adviser in their last investment decision, despite using AI tools, a HSBC survey found.

zh.title: 即使有人工智能工具，投资者仍寻求人性化服务：汇丰
zh.summary: 汇丰一项调查发现，尽管可以使用人工智能工具，投资者在投资决策中仍然依赖专业顾问。这一发现表明投资者重视人类判断力和专业知识，同时也重视技术能力。

title: Anthropic accuses Chinese rival Alibaba of illicitly extracting AI capabilities
summary: Anthropic alleged that Alibaba used fraudulent accounts to improperly access and extract capabilities from its Claude AI model. The accusation highlights growing tensions in competitive AI markets over data access and intellectual property protection.
content: The firm alleged that Alibaba used fraudulent accounts to access data from its Claude AI model.

zh.title: Anthropic指控中国竞争对手阿里巴巴非法提取AI能力
zh.summary: Anthropic声称阿里巴巴使用欺诈账户不当访问和提取其Claude AI模型的功能。这一指控突显了竞争AI市场中关于数据访问和知识产权保护的日益增加的紧张关系。

title: How much does debt settlement cost?
summary: Debt settlement companies can substantially reduce credit card obligations but charge fees for their services, making cost comparison essential for consumers. Understanding fee structures is crucial for evaluating whether debt settlement is viable.
content: A debt settlement company could substantially lower your credit card bills. Find out what (and how) they charge for their services.

zh.title: 债务清算的成本是多少?
zh.summary: 债务清算公司可以大幅减少信用卡债务，但收取服务费用，因此消费者必须比较成本。理解费用结构对于评估债务清算是否可行至关重要。

title: These hidden PCE triggers could force a Fed rate hike — and shock the market
summary: The upcoming PCE inflation report may contain factors triggering unexpected Federal Reserve rate increases, potentially unsettling financial markets. The release represents a critical moment for investors monitoring inflation and monetary policy shifts.
content: The PCE inflation report will either calm Wall Street or ignite fears of a restrictive Fed.

zh.title: 这些隐藏的PCE触发因素可能会迫使美联储加息——并震撼市场
zh.summary: 即将发布的PCE通胀报告可能包含触发意外美联储加息的因素，可能会扰乱金融市场。这份报告对于监控通胀和货币政策变化的投资者来说是一个关键时刻。

title: SK Hynix surges 11% after filing for blockbuster Nasdaq listing
summary: SK Hynix's stock surged 11% after announcing plans to raise up to $29.4 billion through a Nasdaq listing, marking a major move by the South Korean chip giant to access U.S. capital markets. This listing could reshape the semiconductor industry's competitive landscape and investor access to memory chip makers.
content: Shares of South Korean chip giant SK Hynix surged 11% on Thursday after the company said it is seeking to raise as much as $29.4 billion.

zh.title: SK海力士申报纳斯达克上市后股价飙升11%
zh.summary: SK海力士宣布计划通过纳斯达克上市融资最高294亿美元后股价上涨11%，这是这家韩国芯片巨头进入美国资本市场的重大举措。此次上市可能重塑半导体行业的竞争格局和投资者对存储芯片制造商的获取方式。

title: Why SK Hynix’s $30 billion U.S. listing could be a double-edged sword for Micron’s stock
summary: SK Hynix's planned $30 billion U.S. listing could both create new investment opportunities for investors and increase awareness of competitive dynamics in the memory chip market, potentially affecting Micron's relative valuation. The listing represents a significant geographic shift in the semiconductor industry's capital structure.
content: The South Korean memory company could give investors more opportunities beyond Micron, though it may also raise awareness of industry dynamics.

zh.title: SK海力士300亿美元美国上市为何对美光股票是把双刃剑
zh.summary: SK海力士计划的300亿美元美国上市既可能为投资者创造新的投资机会，也可能增强市场对存储芯片市场竞争动态的认识，有可能影响美光的相对估值。此次上市代表了半导体行业资本结构的重大地理转变。

title: Qualcomm’s stock is soaring as these big numbers excite Wall Street
summary: Qualcomm shares surged following announcements of new revenue targets and a strategic partnership with Meta Platforms, signaling investor confidence in the chipmaker's growth prospects. The partnership indicates expanding opportunities in AI and computing markets.
content: Shares of Qualcomm soared on Wednesday after the company announced new revenue targets and a partership with Meta Platforms.

zh.title: 高通股价飙升，这些大数字令华尔街兴奋
zh.summary: 高通股价在公布新的收入目标和与Meta Platforms战略合作伙伴关系后飙升，显示投资者对这家芯片制造商增长前景充满信心。该合作伙伴关系表明在人工智能和计算市场中存在扩大的机遇。

title: Buildings collapse as quakes rock Venezuela, 'high casualties' likely
summary: Two major earthquakes with magnitudes 7.2 and 7.5 struck Venezuela within a minute, with the initial quake centered about 160 km west of Caracas, causing widespread building collapses and likely high casualties. The USGS-confirmed tremors represent a major natural disaster with significant humanitarian impact.
content: A magnitude 7.2 earthquake struck about 160 km (100 miles) west of Caracas, with a magnitude 7.5 tremor hitting less than a minute later, according to the U.S. Geological Survey (USGS).

zh.title: 地震袭击委内瑞拉，建筑物倒塌，可能造成"大量伤亡"
zh.summary: 两次级别分别为7.2和7.5的大地震在一分钟内袭击委内瑞拉，初次地震震中位于卡拉加斯西约160公里处，造成广泛的建筑物倒塌和可能的大量人员伤亡。美国地质勘探局证实的地震代表了一场重大自然灾害，造成了重大的人道主义影响。

title: Inside India newsletter: Meet the humans teaching robots to perform routine tasks, as India finds a way to enter the AI race
summary: Indian companies are emerging as providers of human-generated video training data used to teach robots in the U.S. and China, positioning India as a key player in the global AI development ecosystem. This represents a new avenue for India to participate in the AI revolution while creating employment opportunities.
content: Several companies have cropped up in India providing video training data made by humans that is being used to teach robots in the U.S. and China.

zh.title: 印度内幕通讯：认识那些教机器人执行日常任务的人类，印度找到了进入人工智能竞赛的方式
zh.summary: 印度公司正在成为人类生成的视频训练数据的提供者，这些数据被用于在美国和中国教授机器人，使印度成为全球人工智能发展生态系统中的关键参与者。这代表了印度参与人工智能革命的新途径，同时创造了就业机会。

title: Thursday's big stock stories: What’s likely to move the market in the next trading session
summary: Declines in chip stocks dragged down the Nasdaq Composite on Wednesday, with the S&P 500 also ending slightly lower, setting up potential market movements for the next trading session. Tech sector weakness appears to be a key driver of recent market sentiment and investor positioning.
content: A decline in chip stocks dragged down the Nasdaq Composite on Wednesday. The S&P 500 ended the session slightly lower.

zh.title: 周四的大股票故事：下一个交易时段可能推动市场的因素
zh.summary: 芯片股下跌拖累了纳斯达克综合指数在周三的表现，标普500指数也小幅下跌，为下一个交易时段的潜在市场波动做准备。科技板块疲软似乎是近期市场情绪和投资者定位的关键驱动因素。
